title: CSIR NEERI Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Project Associate Posts
description: National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) has declared the latest job notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for various Senior Project Associate Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech, or M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the CSIR NEERI Recruitment 2026 . Here, we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here...
